item.text: I’ll inspect the email thread and then pull only the customer/company and policy context needed to decide the action.

The thread is a refund request for a Pro purchase made on May 31, with the customer asking on July 15. I’m checking CRM and refund policy before choosing whether to draft, escalate, or take another action.
Policy says standard customers are not refund-eligible after 30 days, and this request is outside that window. I’m creating a draft reply rather than sending directly.

arguments.body:
Hi Maya,

Thanks for reaching out. I checked the purchase date for Acme Health's Pro plan, and because the request was made more than 30 days after purchase, we are not able to process a refund under our refund policy.

I’m sorry it wasn’t the right fit for your operations team. Please let us know if there is anything specific we can help address on the account before the renewal date.

Best,
Support

Best,
Support

item.text: Created the draft for `support_001`. It declines the refund because the standard customer request was made more than 30 days after the May 31 purchase, and includes the relevant evidence IDs.
